projects.title: Portfolio Web-Site
projects.description: This is a responsive personal portfolio website created to showcase my web development skills, projects, and professional information. The website features a modern design with smooth navigation and organized sections including About, Skills, Projects, and Contact. It is developed using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript with a focus on clean UI, responsiveness, and user-friendly interaction. The goal of this project is to present my work in a professional way and provide an easy way for visitors to explore my projects and get in touch.

projects.title: Calculator Webpage
projects.description:
A simple, responsive, and fully functional calculator built using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. This project demonstrates core front-end development skills such as DOM manipulation, event handling, and logical problem-solving.

The calculator performs basic arithmetic operations including addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division, with a real-time display for inputs and results. It features a clean and user-friendly interface, designed using CSS for a modern look and responsive layout across different devices.

JavaScript is used to handle user interactions, process calculations, and manage edge cases like invalid inputs. Overall, this project showcases my ability to create interactive and efficient web applications using fundamental web technologies.

projects.title: ToDo List
projects.description:
A dynamic and user-friendly To-Do List web application built using React, HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. This project showcases my ability to develop interactive user interfaces using modern front-end technologies and component-based architecture.

The application allows users to add, edit, delete, and mark tasks as completed, helping them manage daily activities efficiently. It features real-time updates, ensuring a smooth and responsive user experience without page reloads.

React is used to manage the application’s state and UI components, enabling efficient rendering and better code organization. CSS is applied to create a clean, responsive design that works seamlessly across different devices.

This project highlights my understanding of React fundamentals, state management, event handling, and building practical, real-world applications.

projects.title: Admin Dashboard Frontend
projects.description: A modern, responsive Admin Dashboard built using HTML and CSS with a clean layout, smooth UI, and interactive project cards.

certificates.title: Cyber Heist - ALL KERALA CYBERSECURITY BOOTCAMP
certificates.description: This is to certify that the participant has successfully completed the 2-Day Bootcamp titled “Cyber Heist – All Kerala Cybersecurity Bootcamp”. The program focused on key areas of modern cybersecurity, including Deepfake technologies, Open-Source Intelligence (OSINT), Penetration Testing, Distributed Denial-of-Service (DDoS) attacks, and practical exposure to tools such as Flipper Zero. The bootcamp also included hands-on sessions involving real-machine attack simulations in controlled environments, providing participants with practical experience in identifying and mitigating cyber threats.

certificates.title: Prompt Engineering Masterclass
certificates.description: A Prompt Engineering Masterclass provided by Great Learning, focused on learning how to effectively interact with AI tools like ChatGPT. It covers techniques such as prompt structuring, iterative refinement, and context-based querying to generate accurate and meaningful outputs. This project demonstrates skills in AI interaction, critical thinking, and optimizing prompts for various real-world applications.
